---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Use case

Who needs this, and what workflow does it improve?

## Proposed behavior

What should the tool do?

## Safety considerations

Does this involve paid APIs, external uploads, deletes, overwrites, credentials, or private product data?

## Example input/output

Share a small synthetic example if possible.
